channel.title: MemeGame on Stork'Studios
channel.description: Recent content in MemeGame on Stork'Studios

item.title: Most Wanted
item.description: Introduction Hi there! It’s Daniel “Danwiepier” Wiechetek from Stork’Studios here. I am one of the artists responsible for 2D assets in Stork’Studios’ games. In my first post, I would like to write about a game jam project inspired by one of Poland’s niche internet memes about an unnecessary destruction of a bridge. The whole game is in Polish and available to play on itch.io. What is the meme about The meme refers to a story about a guy who, against orders, wanted to bomb a bridge even though he had been instructed to capture it from terrorists.
